title: oldenlandia conostyla
intro: Oldenlandia conostyla is a plant species native to Asia, classified as an herbaceous perennial or annual in the family Rubiaceae. It has been traditionally used in medicine for its purported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oldenlandia conostyla are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and aiding in the treatment of respiratory and digestive issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or infusion, and can also be used in the form of dried powder or extract for various herbal remedies.
